parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Execute a prompt in non-interactive mode. Claude Code runs the prompt and exits when done.

parameters.name: model [optional]
parameters.description: Set the Claude model to use. Empty means use the Claude Code default or config.

parameters.name: effort [optional]
parameters.description: Set Claude Code's effort level for this run. Supported values include low, medium, high, xhigh, and max. Empty means use the model default or config.
parameters.help_text: Set Claude Code's effort level for this run. Supported values include low, medium, high, xhigh, and max. Empty means use the model default or config.

parameters.name: max-budget-usd [optional]
parameters.description: Set the maximum dollar amount Claude Code may spend on API calls before stopping. Leave unset for no budget limit.
parameters.help_text: Set the maximum dollar amount Claude Code may spend on API calls before stopping. Leave unset for no budget limit.

parameters.name: use-bedrock [optional]
parameters.description: Set CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK=1 to route Claude Code through Amazon Bedrock. Must add AWS credentials.
parameters.help_text: Set CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK=1 to route Claude Code through Amazon Bedrock. Must add AWS credentials.

parameters.name: update-claude [optional]
parameters.description: Update the Claude Code CLI tool before use.
parameters.help_text: Update the Claude Code CLI tool before use.
